reviews.title: Unplesant Stay
reviews.text:
Upon arriving in Dalat after an overnight bus journey, we reached the hotel at 6 am. We were grateful that the hotel management allowed us to pay 150k VND per room for an early check-in. While the location wasn't as central (with no shops within walking distance), it provided a quiet place to stay, albeit necessitating Grab rides to get around. The staff was friendly during our stay.

Due to our 10 pm night bus to HCM City, we requested a late check-out, which was granted with an additional charge of 150k VND per room. We appreciated the flexibility of the hotel management in accommodating our needs.

However, our experience took a turn during check-out. The staff began inspecting the rooms and charged us a cleaning fee for a stained bedsheet caused by a spilled medicated oil, which we understood and paid for. But then they claimed that another room, where my brother stayed, had lost a towel and demanded payment for it. Upon checking with my brother, we discovered that the hotel staff had taken the towel on the second day of our stay. We explained that we had intended to clean the stain but the hotel staff had taken the towel, leaving us unable to do so. Despite this, they insisted on payment for the stained towel. Additionally, although the hotel claimed there was no housekeeping during the stay unless we requested it, we found out that our room had been tidied up without our request. This incident led to the unfounded accusation that we had taken the towel in our luggage, followed by claims of a stain on the towel.

Overall, our stay was marred by this unpleasant experience, leaving us dissatisfied with the hotel's handling of the situation.
reviews.response: Hello, we have received your complaint about hotel service. We are sorry for your imperfect experience when visiting . affirming that we always listen and put customers at the center of development. will seriously learn from experience and retrain hotel services. Hope to continue to receive your companionship in the future!

reviews.title: Hotel ok, but overall I had a bad experience
reviews.text:
To be honest, I didn't expect much as this hotel was relatively cheap for our 3 night stay.  Our hotel room was fine, except for one issue in the bathroom that needed to be repaired. After our first night, I noticed a pen mark/stain on the sheet. It was relatively small, so I didn't take any notice. Upon checking out, I was asked to pay 500,000 dong for staining the sheet. A guy came down and showed me a sheet with a very large ink stain mark that looked to have been treated with chemicals to make it look really bad.  I was shocked by the nastiness of the hotel staff and they said it was hotel
Policy to charge. There is no way, I made this mark and I felt the hotel was trying to pull a fast one. My wife is Vietnamese and was more gentle than me. They wouldn't give back her Id card unless she paid. They dropped the amount to a few hundred dong. It wasn't the money but the principle of this, as we certainly didn't do this. I refused to pay of course and left without paying.. I should also state the garage doesn't appear to have a light and is very dark at night. Maybe there is a switch somewhere but it doesn't come on automatically. Litter was very noticeable near the lift. On the Thursday evening, after driving down the ramp on my bike, it skidded and my wife and I fell off the bike. The floor was wet and slippy. I was going very slowly down the ramp. One of the persons there, said it was my fault as I pulled the front brake going at speed. This wasn't true! Please be weary about booking this hotel especially if you are a foreigner
reviews.response:
Thanh Do 1 Hotel thanks you for your comments when staying at the hotel
Regarding the stain on your bed sheet, we have checked and confirmed that this stain cannot be washed out, so we support charging an additional fee because of this stain, we have to discard this bed sheet and buy a new bed sheet
We have also tried our best to support you by reducing the additional fee. At the same time, when you check in, in the room we also have a list of rules and additional fees for the equipment in the room
Once again, we are sorry for the incidents during your stay

reviews.title: Good location, great staff and good value.
reviews.text: We spent three nights at this hotel recently and our first room was a bit disappointing., room 206 corner room facing  the front. We had no view (which we wanted) and the shower head is in the MIDDLE of the bathroom with no barrier and everything gets wet. It was also noisy at night as you could hear people coming and going and also the patio of the hotel next door. We asked to be moved to the rear of the hotel and Dinh, the manager,  apologized and obliged us without question.  He also called the bus company for information on onward travel for us to Buon Ma Thuot and arranged a pickup at the hotel and saw us off. We appreciated his cooperation in resolving the issues and would got hesitate to stay there again and recommend it to others.

reviews.title: It was an accommodation I booked urgently, but I was satisfied with it.
reviews.text: The price was very attractive, and since I stayed on the third floor, the view of the village was beautiful. There were stairs at the entrance, and as a long-term traveler, I had a lot of luggage, so it was a bit difficult to go up. The room size, cleanliness, and amenities' interior were all good, and since it had a smart TV, I could watch YouTube. The shared terrace that I could access from the hallway allowed me to see my entire room, so I enjoyed the view for a moment and then closed the curtains. I briefly opened the window facing the terrace for ventilation, but the male caretaker told me to close it (I guessed it was because there was no screen and bugs could come in), which surprised me when our eyes met. This means that I could meet anyone's eyes outside the terrace window, not just the caretaker from my room. Since I was traveling alone, I was a bit worried because there was no lock on the inside of the door. Also, it was not a digital key. Overall, considering the price, it was excellent, but I hesitate to recommend it to those who have many concerns. I would like to suggest the hotel install an inner double lock on the door. Adding one lock would be more effective than improving the digital key or the stairs.

reviews.title: TỆ VÌ LỄ TÂN
reviews.text:
Mình ở Savio từ Hoàng Hoa Thám qua tới Triệu Việt Vương cũng phải 4 lần. Mà lần đầu thấy trải nghiệm tệ ở chi nhánh này. Có thuê xe máy 2 ngày trả xong quên kiểm tra cốp xe. Tới sáng ngày gần về mới nhớ quên cái nón brand Stressmama 500k, xuống hỏi lễ tân thì đã đổi ca bạn khác, thì bạn ấy hỗ trợ gọi bạn ca trước, thì nghe được câu trả lời là tưởng của mình nên đem về. Chứ không có tưởng của khách mà để lại quầy để lỡ khách có kiếm 🙄. Xong chắc cũng quê quá book ship đem ra bến xe trả. Rồi về tới SG, mở balo ra để lấy đồ đem đi giặt, thì mới biết mất cái quần short trắng cũng brand Stressmama giá cũng tầm 500k, có nhắn tin hỏi home thì home báo tạp vụ dọn phòng không thấy. 

Mình đồng ý để quên đồ là mình sai, nhưng mình chỉ thắc mắc là đồ mình để quên là cái “quần”. Không lẽ mình mặc ra đường đi chơi rồi cởi chuồng về, mà cứ kêu mình kiểm tra xem có để quên đâu không ?!?!?  Trong khi bạn lễ tân đã muốn tham lam cái nón, thì thử hỏi cái “quần” mình nó đi về đâu. Dọn phòng tìm không thấy thì ok coi như mất đi, nhưng sẽ không bao giờ quay lại chi nhánh này. Quá tệ

reviews.text:
Thật sự mình quá không hiểu vì sao 1 ksan với cách làm việc hời hợt của lễ tân và cách xử lý thiếu chuyên nghiệp lại được điểm cao như vậy. 
Hôm mình checkin, lễ tân gặp khách không nhìn và chào 1 lời. 
- Mình vẫn rất là hoan hỉ. Chuyện là hôm đó bạn cùng phòng mình k may ói lên trên giường. ( nhưng chỉ dính 1 chút) toàn bộ là dưới đất. 
Mình có gọi lễ tân là thay giúp mình cái bọc mệm và mình có báo là từ lúc vô phòng tới giờ mình chưa vào nhà vệ sinh, nhưng mình dọn bãi ói và mở nắp thùng rác thì vẫn còn rác vs của khách trước. 
Đợi b 10p, bạn cầm 1 cái bọc mới và báo với mình phí 200k dọn dẹp. Mình biết này lỗi bên mình. Nhưng có hỏi bạn phí 200k là giặt cái bọc hay sao. B kêu phí dọn dẹp. Mình thấy vô lí là mình đã dọn rồi, nên có hỏi mình mang ga ra ngoài giặt đc k, bạn báo k. Mình oke với việc đó nên cho bạn vô thay ga, nghiệp vụ quá kém. Thay 1 ga giường gần 15p chưa xong, lúc sau thì đem 1 cái ga rách qua thay cho mình. 
Phòng cách âm kém, 3h sáng mình còn bị đánh thức bởi các khách khác.

reviews.response:
Kính gửi Ms Nhi
Khách sạn Thành Đô 1 rất cảm ơn chị đã đưa ra những đánh giá và góp ý khi lưu trú tại khách sạn. Chúng tôi trân trọng và lắng nghe ý kiến từ khách hàng để không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ. Nhưng ở trường hợp của mình bên em xin làm rõ một số vấn đề
- Chị có đặt phòng tại khách sạn 1 đêm ngày 18/6 phòng Superior Double sau đó chị muốn đặt thêm 2 đêm ngày 19,20/6 với mức giá phòng Standard Double nhưng chị muốn bên em hỗ trợ chị phòng lấy phòng Superior Double. Các bạn bên em có lịch sự từ chối nhưng chị lại có thái độ xúc phạm nhân viên bên em
- Giờ check out bên em là 12:00 nhưng chị check out lúc 13:00 bên em cũng đồng ý hỗ trợ và khi trả phòng chị còn làm hư ra mền nhưng bên em vẫn hỗ trợ không charge phí vì mong muốn chị hài lòng nhất khi lưu trú tại khách sạn
Một lần nữa khách sạn bên em rất tiếc vì những trải nghiệm của chị và hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội  phục vụ chị trong lần lưu trú tiếp theo
